file.content:
FROM maven:3.8-openjdk-8 AS builder

WORKDIR /home/app

COPY server/ /home/app/
RUN mvn clean package -DskipTests -Ppro

FROM openjdk:8-jre-alpine

WORKDIR /app

COPY --from=builder /home/app/api/target/surveyking-*.jar /app/app.jar

EXPOSE 1991
RUN mkdir -p /app/files /app/logs

CMD ["java", "-jar", "/app/app.jar"]

content.text: `openjdk:8-jre-alpine` 已经从 Docker Hub 下架了，换个还活着的镜像就行。

FROM maven:3.8-openjdk-8 AS builder

WORKDIR /home/app

COPY server/ /home/app/
RUN mvn clean package -DskipTests -Ppro

FROM openjdk:8-jre-alpine

WORKDIR /app

COPY --from=builder /home/app/api/target/surveyking-*.jar /app/app.jar

EXPOSE 1991
RUN mkdir -p /app/files /app/logs

CMD ["java", "-jar", "/app/app.jar"]

content.text:
搞定。`openjdk` 官方 Docker 镜像已经废弃了，换成 `eclipse-temurin:8-jre-alpine`，这是 Adoptium 维护的替代品，兼容性没问题。

**改动总结：** `deploy/Dockerfile` 第 8 行，把已下架的 `openjdk:8-jre-alpine` 基础镜像替换为 `eclipse-temurin:8-jre-alpine`。重新跑 `docker build` 就行了。

content.text:
**Translation:** "The Kubernetes deployment failed — the namespace 'surveyking' doesn't exist. How do I fix this?"

这他妈就是 namespace 不存在嘛。k8s 里你得先有 namespace 才能操作里面的资源。

有两个方案，爹你选一个：

| 方案 | 做法 | 适用场景 |
|------|------|----------|
| **A. 创建 namespace** | 在 rollout restart 之前加 `kubectl create namespace surveyking --dry-run=client -o yaml \| kubectl apply -f -` | 这是个新环境，还没部署过 |
| **B. 改成已有的 namespace** | 把 `-n surveyking` 换成实际存在的 namespace | namespace 名字搞错了 |

你先确认下：
1. 这个 surveyking 服务之前在 k8s 上部署过没？
2. 部署用的 namespace 叫什么？（让运维跑个 `kubectl get ns` 看看）

如果是全新部署，光 `rollout restart` 也不够——你得先有 Deployment 资源（yaml manifest），`rollout restart` 只是重启已有的 deployment。你需要的是完整的 k8s 部署流程（创建 namespace → apply deployment/service yaml → 然后才能 rollout restart）。

把你的 CI/CD pipeline 配置文件（`.gitlab-ci.yml`）和 k8s 部署 yaml 发我看看，我帮你理清楚。

content: 全新部署  , 项目都在这了啊，

file.content:
stages:
  - check
  - docker
  - deploy

# ==================== 测试服 (testserver 分支) ====================

# 检查 K8s 连接
check-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: check
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    - testserver
  script:
    - kubectl config view

# 构建并推送镜像到内网仓库
docker-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: docker
  image: docker:19.03
  only:
    - testserver
  script:
    - docker build -f deploy/Dockerfile . -t 192.168.0.63:5000/px-surveyking-test:latest
    - docker push 192.168.0.63:5000/px-surveyking-test:latest
    - echo "镜像构建及推送完成"

# K8s 滚动更新
deploy-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: deploy
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    refs:
      - testserver
  script:
    - kubectl rollout restart deployment surveyking-deploy -n surveyking

# ==================== 正式服 (master 分支) ====================

# 构建并推送镜像到 GCR
docker-master:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: docker
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/google/cloud-sdk:latest
  interruptible: true
  only:
    - master
  script:
    - gcloud auth activate-service-account --key-file ${GOOGLE_ONLINE_CONTAINER_REGISTRY}
    - gcloud auth configure-docker --quiet
    - docker build -f deploy/Dockerfile . -t us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-surveyking:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker push us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-surveyking:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker tag us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-surveyking:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-surveyking:latest
    - docker push us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-surveyking:latest
    - echo "px-surveyking:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} 推送成功"

# 部署留痕
deploy-master:
  tags:
    - xshell
  only:
    refs:
      - master
  stage: deploy
  variables:
    CACHE_DIR: "shell-runner-cache/surveyking-deployment"
    DIST_REPO: "https://oauth2:mTVn_6baAR8Koua-ZGcB@pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/px/surveyking/deployment.git"
  script:
    - export CACHE_DIR=${HOME}/${CACHE_DIR}
    - if ! [ -e $CACHE_DIR ]; then git clone -q $DIST_REPO $CACHE_DIR; fi
    - cd $CACHE_DIR
    - git fetch -q --prune --tags "origin"
    - git checkout -B master remotes/origin/master
    - cd $CACHE_DIR
    - git config user.email "$GITLAB_USER_EMAIL"
    - git config user.name "$GITLAB_USER_NAME"
    - 'git commit --allow-empty -m "surveyking: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE (SHA: $CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA)"'
    - git push -q "origin" master:master
    - echo "部署留痕提交完成"
  dependencies:
    - docker-master

file.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: surveyking-deploy
  namespace: surveyking
  labels:
    app: surveyking
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: surveyking
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: surveyking
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: surveyking
          image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-surveyking-test:latest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 1991
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
                name: surveyking-env
          volumeMounts:
            - name: surveyking-data
              mountPath: /app/files
              subPath: files
            - name: surveyking-data
              mountPath: /app/logs
              subPath: logs
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "512Mi"
              cpu: "250m"
            limits:
              memory: "1Gi"
              cpu: "1000m"
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 1991
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 1991
            initialDelaySeconds: 60
            periodSeconds: 30
      volumes:
        - name: surveyking-data
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: surveyking-pvc
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: surveyking
  namespace: surveyking
  labels:
    app: surveyking
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 1991
      targetPort: 1991
      protocol: TCP
  selector:
    app: surveyking

file.content:
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolume
metadata:
  name: surveyking-pv
  labels:
    app: surveyking
spec:
  capacity:
    storage: 16Gi
  accessModes:
    - ReadWriteOnce
  persistentVolumeReclaimPolicy: Retain
  hostPath:
    path: /mnt/data/surveyking
    type: DirectoryOrCreate
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: surveyking-pvc
  namespace: surveyking
spec:
  accessModes:
    - ReadWriteOnce
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: 16Gi
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: surveyking

content.text:
操，明白了。k8s 资源文件都写好了但 CI 里根本没 apply 过，直接就 `rollout restart`，那他妈 namespace、deployment 都不存在当然报错。

问题很清楚：**全新部署需要先 `kubectl apply` 这些 yaml 文件，之后才能 `rollout restart`。**

另外 deployment 里引用了 `configMapRef: surveyking-env`，这个 ConfigMap 也得先创建，不然 Pod 起不来。

我帮你改 `.gitlab-ci.yml`，在 deploy 阶段先 apply 所有 k8s 资源：

input.old_string:
# K8s 滚动更新
deploy-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: deploy
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    refs:
      - testserver
  script:
    - kubectl rollout restart deployment surveyking-deploy -n surveyking
input.new_string:
# K8s 部署（首次 apply + 滚动更新）
deploy-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: deploy
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    refs:
      - testserver
  script:
    - kubectl apply -f deploy/k8s/test/01-namespace.yaml
    - kubectl apply -f deploy/k8s/test/02-surveyking-pv.yaml
    - kubectl apply -f deploy/k8s/test/03-surveyking-deployment.yaml
    - kubectl rollout restart deployment surveyking-deploy -n surveyking

  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    refs:
      - testserver
  script:
    - kubectl rollout restart deployment surveyking-deploy -n surveyking

# ==================== 正式服 (master 分支) ====================

# 构建并推送镜像到 GCR
docker-master:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: docker
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/google/cloud-sdk:latest
  interruptible: true
  only:
    - master
  script:
    - gcloud auth activate-service-account --key-file ${GOOGLE_ONLINE_CONTAINER_REGISTRY}
    - gcloud auth configure-docker --quiet
    - docker build -f deploy/Dockerfile . -t us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-surveyking:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker push us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-surveyking:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker tag us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-surveyking:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-surveyking:latest
    - docker push us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-surveyking:latest
    - echo "px-surveyking:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} 推送成功"

# 部署留痕
deploy-master:
  tags:
    - xshell
  only:
    refs:
      - master
  stage: deploy
  variables:
    CACHE_DIR: "shell-runner-cache/surveyking-deployment"
    DIST_REPO: "https://oauth2:mTVn_6baAR8Koua-ZGcB@pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/px/surveyking/deployment.git"
  script:
    - export CACHE_DIR=${HOME}/${CACHE_DIR}
    - if ! [ -e $CACHE_DIR ]; then git clone -q $DIST_REPO $CACHE_DIR; fi
    - cd $CACHE_DIR
    - git fetch -q --prune --tags "origin"
    - git checkout -B master remotes/origin/master
    - cd $CACHE_DIR
    - git config user.email "$GITLAB_USER_EMAIL"
    - git config user.name "$GITLAB_USER_NAME"
    - 'git commit --allow-empty -m "surveyking: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE (SHA: $CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA)"'
    - git push -q "origin" master:master
    - echo "部署留痕提交完成"
  dependencies:
    - docker-master

lines: +# K8s 部署（首次 apply + 滚动更新）

content.text:
改好了。`kubectl apply` 是幂等的，首次会创建资源，后续再跑只会更新有变化的部分，不会重复创建。

但还有个问题要确认：**`03-surveyking-deployment.yaml` 里引用了 `configMapRef: surveyking-env`**，你需要创建这个 ConfigMap，里面放数据库连接等环境变量。你告诉我需要配哪些环境变量（数据库地址、端口、密码等），我帮你写一个 ConfigMap yaml。

**改动总结：**
1. `deploy/Dockerfile`：`openjdk:8-jre-alpine` → `eclipse-temurin:8-jre-alpine`（镜像已下架）
2. `.gitlab-ci.yml`：deploy-testserver 阶段增加 `kubectl apply` 三个 yaml 文件，确保 namespace、PV/PVC、Deployment/Service 都先创建好，再 rollout restart

file.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: collabspace-server-deploy
  namespace: collabspace
spec:
  replicas: 1
  revisionHistoryLimit: 3
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxUnavailable: 0
      maxSurge: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: collabspace-server
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: collabspace-server
      annotations:
        prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
        prometheus.io/port: "8081"
        prometheus.io/path: "/api/v1/actuator/prometheus"
    spec:
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 60
      securityContext:
        fsGroup: 1000
      initContainers:
        - name: init-dirs
          image: busybox
          command: ['sh', '-c', 'mkdir -p /app/logs/gc /app/logs/dump /app/logs/backend /app/redis && chmod -R 755 /app && chown -R 999:999 /app/redis']
          volumeMounts:
            - name: collabspace-server-volume
              mountPath: /app/logs
              subPath: logs
            - name: collabspace-server-volume
              mountPath: /app/redis
              subPath: redis
      containers:
        - name: collabspace-server
          image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-collaspace-server-test:latest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          command: ["java"]
          args:
            - "-jar"
            - "-XX:+UseG1GC"
            - "-XX:InitialHeapSize=2g"
            - "-XX:MaxHeapSize=4g"
            - "-XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=500"
            - "-XX:+DisableExplicitGC"
            - "-XX:+UseStringDeduplication"
            - "-XX:+ParallelRefProcEnabled"
            - "-XX:MaxMetaspaceSize=512m"
            - "-XX:MaxTenuringThreshold=1"
            - "-XX:+HeapDumpOnOutOfMemoryError"
            - "-XX:HeapDumpPath=/app/logs/dump/heapdump.bin"
            - "-Xlog:gc=debug:file=/app/logs/gc/gc.log:time,uptime,level,tags:filecount=5,filesize=100m"
            - "/app/app.jar"
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
                name: collabspace-configmap
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "2560Mi"
            limits:
              memory: "5Gi"
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8081
            - containerPort: 8084
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /api/v1/actuator/health/readiness
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 30
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /api/v1/actuator/health/liveness
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 100
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 3
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: collabspace-server-volume
              mountPath: /app/logs
              subPath: logs
          lifecycle:
            preStop:
              exec:
                command: ["sh", "-c", "sleep 5"]
        - name: redis
          image: redis:7
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          securityContext:
            runAsUser: 999
            runAsGroup: 999
          ports:
            - containerPort: 6379
          command:
            - "redis-server"
            - "--appendonly"
            - "yes"
            - "--dir"
            - "/data"
          volumeMounts:
            - name: collabspace-server-volume
              mountPath: /data
              subPath: redis
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command: ["redis-cli", "--raw", "incr", "ping"]
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 5
          livenessProbe:
            exec:
              command: ["redis-cli", "--raw", "incr", "ping"]
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          lifecycle:
            preStop:
              exec:
                command: ["sh", "-c", "redis-cli SAVE && sleep 2"]
      volumes:
        - name: collabspace-server-volume
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: collabspace-server-pvc
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: collabspace-server-svc
  namespace: collabspace
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 8081
      targetPort: 8081
      protocol: TCP
      name: http-port
    - port: 8084
      targetPort: 8084
      protocol: TCP
      name: grpc-port
  selector:
    app: collabspace-server

file.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: surveyking-deploy
  namespace: surveyking
  labels:
    app: surveyking
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: surveyking
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: surveyking
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: surveyking
          image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-surveyking-test:latest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 1991
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
                name: surveyking-env
          volumeMounts:
            - name: surveyking-data
              mountPath: /app/files
              subPath: files
            - name: surveyking-data
              mountPath: /app/logs
              subPath: logs
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "512Mi"
              cpu: "250m"
            limits:
              memory: "1Gi"
              cpu: "1000m"
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 1991
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 1991
            initialDelaySeconds: 60
            periodSeconds: 30
      volumes:
        - name: surveyking-data
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: surveyking-pvc
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: surveyking
  namespace: surveyking
  labels:
    app: surveyking
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 1991
      targetPort: 1991
      protocol: TCP
  selector:
    app: surveyking

content.text:
明白了爹，你是要把 surveyking 的 k8s 配置放到 `kubernetes/` 这个统一管理的仓库里，跟其他项目（collabspace、apitable 等）保持一致的风格。

我对照 collabspace 的风格，把 `deploy/k8s/test/` 下的三个文件整合重写到 `kubernetes/surveyking/` 目录下。

需要确认几个事：

1. **ConfigMap `surveyking-env`** — 你的数据库连接信息是什么？需要配哪些环境变量？（数据库地址、端口、用户名、密码、AI token 等）
2. **PVC 的 `volumeName`** — collabspace 用了 `volumeName` 绑定指定 PV，你现有的用了 `selector.matchLabels`，我统一改成 `volumeName` 方式？

先不管 ConfigMap 的值，我先把结构建起来，你后面填值就行：

content.content: (Bash completed with no output)

input.content:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: surveyking

apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolume
metadata:
  name: surveyking-pv
spec:
  capacity:
    storage: 16Gi
  accessModes:
    - ReadWriteOnce
  hostPath:
    path: "/mnt/data/surveyking"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: surveyking-pvc
  namespace: surveyking
spec:
  volumeName: surveyking-pv
  accessModes:
    - ReadWriteOnce
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: 16Gi

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: surveyking-deploy
  namespace: surveyking
spec:
  replicas: 1
  revisionHistoryLimit: 3
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxUnavailable: 0
      maxSurge: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: surveyking
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: surveyking
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: surveyking
          image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-surveyking-test:latest
          imagePullPolicy: Always

            - containerPort: 1991
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:

          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "512Mi"
              cpu: "250m"
            limits:
              memory: "1Gi"
              cpu: "1000m"
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 1991
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 1991
            initialDelaySeconds: 60
            periodSeconds: 30
            failureThreshold: 3
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: surveyking-data
              mountPath: /app/files
              subPath: files
            - name: surveyking-data
              mountPath: /app/logs
              subPath: logs
          lifecycle:
            preStop:
              exec:
                command: ["sh", "-c", "sleep 5"]
      volumes:
        - name: surveyking-data
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: surveyking-pvc

stages:
  - check
  - docker
  - deploy

# ==================== 测试服 (testserver 分支) ====================

# 检查 K8s 连接
check-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: check
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    - testserver
  script:
    - kubectl config view

# 构建并推送镜像到内网仓库
docker-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: docker
  image: docker:19.03
  only:
    - testserver
  script:
    - docker build -f deploy/Dockerfile . -t 192.168.0.63:5000/px-surveyking-test:latest
    - docker push 192.168.0.63:5000/px-surveyking-test:latest
    - echo "镜像构建及推送完成"

# K8s 部署（首次 apply + 滚动更新）
deploy-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: deploy
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    refs:
      - testserver
  script:
    - kubectl apply -f deploy/k8s/test/01-namespace.yaml
    - kubectl apply -f deploy/k8s/test/02-surveyking-pv.yaml
    - kubectl apply -f deploy/k8s/test/03-surveyking-deployment.yaml
    - kubectl rollout restart deployment surveyking-deploy -n surveyking

# ==================== 正式服 (master 分支) ====================

# 构建并推送镜像到 GCR
docker-master:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: docker
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/google/cloud-sdk:latest
  interruptible: true
  only:
    - master
  script:
    - gcloud auth activate-service-account --key-file ${GOOGLE_ONLINE_CONTAINER_REGISTRY}
    - gcloud auth configure-docker --quiet
    - docker build -f deploy/Dockerfile . -t us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-surveyking:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker push us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-surveyking:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker tag us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-surveyking:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-surveyking:latest
    - docker push us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-surveyking:latest
    - echo "px-surveyking:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} 推送成功"

# 部署留痕
deploy-master:
  tags:
    - xshell
  only:
    refs:
      - master
  stage: deploy
  variables:
    CACHE_DIR: "shell-runner-cache/surveyking-deployment"
    DIST_REPO: "https://oauth2:mTVn_6baAR8Koua-ZGcB@pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/px/surveyking/deployment.git"
  script:
    - export CACHE_DIR=${HOME}/${CACHE_DIR}
    - if ! [ -e $CACHE_DIR ]; then git clone -q $DIST_REPO $CACHE_DIR; fi
    - cd $CACHE_DIR
    - git fetch -q --prune --tags "origin"
    - git checkout -B master remotes/origin/master
    - cd $CACHE_DIR
    - git config user.email "$GITLAB_USER_EMAIL"
    - git config user.name "$GITLAB_USER_NAME"
    - 'git commit --allow-empty -m "surveyking: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE (SHA: $CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA)"'
    - git push -q "origin" master:master
    - echo "部署留痕提交完成"
  dependencies:
    - docker-master

搞定了。现在 `kubernetes/surveyking/` 目录结构：

```
kubernetes/surveyking/
├── namespace.yaml              # namespace
├── surveyking-pv.yaml          # PV + PVC
├── surveyking-configmap.yaml   # 环境变量（需要你填数据库信息）
└── surveyking-deployment.yaml  # Deployment + Service
```

风格跟 collabspace 对齐了，补了：
- `revisionHistoryLimit`、`rollingUpdate` 策略
- `lifecycle.preStop` 优雅停机
- `failureThreshold`、`timeoutSeconds` 探针参数
- ConfigMap 名字统一为 `surveyking-configmap`
- Service 名字统一为 `surveyking-svc`

**你需要做的：** 把 `surveyking-configmap.yaml` 里的 `TODO_FILL_ME` 换成实际的数据库用户名和密码。MySQL 地址我写的 `mysql-svc.mysql:3306`，如果你们测试环境的 MySQL 地址不一样也改一下。

file.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: mysql
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: mysql
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: mysql
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: mysql
        image: mysql:8.0
        ports:
        - containerPort: 3306
        env:
        - name: MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD
          value: "123456"
        volumeMounts:
        - name: mysql-persistent-storage
          mountPath: /var/lib/mysql
        - name: mysql-config
          mountPath: /etc/mysql/conf.d
      volumes:
      - name: mysql-persistent-storage
        persistentVolumeClaim:
          claimName: mysql-pvc
      - name: mysql-config
        configMap:
          name: mysql-configmap
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: mysql
spec:
  type: NodePort
  ports:
  - port: 3306
    targetPort: 3306
    nodePort: 30306
    protocol: TCP
    name: mysql-port
  selector:
    app: mysql

# 检查 K8s 连接
check-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: check
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    - testserver
  script:
    - kubectl config view

# 构建并推送镜像到内网仓库
docker-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: docker
  image: docker:19.03
  only:
    - testserver
  script:
    - docker build -f deploy/Dockerfile . -t 192.168.0.63:5000/px-surveyking-test:latest
    - docker push 192.168.0.63:5000/px-surveyking-test:latest
    - echo "镜像构建及推送完成"

# K8s 部署（首次 apply + 滚动更新）
deploy-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: deploy
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    refs:
      - testserver
  script:
    - kubectl apply -f kubernetes/surveyking/namespace.yaml
    - kubectl apply -f kubernetes/surveyking/surveyking-pv.yaml
    - kubectl apply -f kubernetes/surveyking/surveyking-configmap.yaml
    - kubectl apply -f kubernetes/surveyking/surveyking-deployment.yaml
    - kubectl rollout restart deployment surveyking-deploy -n surveyking

# ==================== 正式服 (master 分支) ====================

# 构建并推送镜像到 GCR
docker-master:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: docker
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/google/cloud-sdk:latest
  interruptible: true
  only:
    - master
  script:
    - gcloud auth activate-service-account --key-file ${GOOGLE_ONLINE_CONTAINER_REGISTRY}
    - gcloud auth configure-docker --quiet
    - docker build -f deploy/Dockerfile . -t us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-surveyking:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker push us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-surveyking:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker tag us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-surveyking:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-surveyking:latest
    - docker push us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-surveyking:latest
    - echo "px-surveyking:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} 推送成功"

# 部署留痕
deploy-master:
  tags:
    - xshell
  only:
    refs:
      - master
  stage: deploy
  variables:
    CACHE_DIR: "shell-runner-cache/surveyking-deployment"
    DIST_REPO: "https://oauth2:mTVn_6baAR8Koua-ZGcB@pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/px/surveyking/deployment.git"
  script:
    - export CACHE_DIR=${HOME}/${CACHE_DIR}
    - if ! [ -e $CACHE_DIR ]; then git clone -q $DIST_REPO $CACHE_DIR; fi
    - cd $CACHE_DIR
    - git fetch -q --prune --tags "origin"
    - git checkout -B master remotes/origin/master
    - cd $CACHE_DIR
    - git config user.email "$GITLAB_USER_EMAIL"
    - git config user.name "$GITLAB_USER_NAME"
    - 'git commit --allow-empty -m "surveyking: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE (SHA: $CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA)"'
    - git push -q "origin" master:master
    - echo "部署留痕提交完成"
  dependencies:
    - docker-master

content.text:
不用改了，现在没问题。`kubernetes/surveyking/` 下的四个文件路径都对得上。

但有个小点：`kubernetes/` 这个目录是不是独立的 git 仓库？如果它是单独 clone 下来的，CI runner 里跑的时候可能没有这个目录——runner 只会 checkout `surveyking` 这个仓库的代码。

你确认下 `kubernetes/` 是 surveyking 仓库里的目录，还是你本地手动放进去的另一个仓库？如果是另一个仓库，那 CI 里需要单独 clone 或者用 git submodule。

content.text:
操，果然是独立仓库。那 CI runner checkout surveyking 代码的时候根本不会有 `kubernetes/` 这个目录，`kubectl apply -f kubernetes/surveyking/...` 肯定找不到文件。

得改 `.gitlab-ci.yml`，deploy 阶段先 clone kubernetes 仓库：

script:
    - kubectl apply -f kubernetes/surveyking/namespace.yaml
    - kubectl apply -f kubernetes/surveyking/surveyking-pv.yaml
    - kubectl apply -f kubernetes/surveyking/surveyking-configmap.yaml
    - kubectl apply -f kubernetes/surveyking/surveyking-deployment.yaml
    - kubectl rollout restart deployment surveyking-deploy -n surveyking
input.new_string:
script:
    - git clone https://oauth2:mTVn_6baAR8Koua-ZGcB@pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/px/collabspace/kubernetes.git /tmp/kubernetes
    - kubectl apply -f /tmp/kubernetes/surveyking/namespace.yaml
    - kubectl apply -f /tmp/kubernetes/surveyking/surveyking-pv.yaml
    - kubectl apply -f /tmp/kubernetes/surveyking/surveyking-configmap.yaml
    - kubectl apply -f /tmp/kubernetes/surveyking/surveyking-deployment.yaml
    - kubectl rollout restart deployment surveyking-deploy -n surveyking

好了，骂得对。deploy 阶段先 clone kubernetes 仓库到 `/tmp/kubernetes`，再从那里 apply yaml 文件。

**改动总结：** `.gitlab-ci.yml` deploy-testserver 阶段增加 `git clone kubernetes` 仓库的步骤，因为 kubernetes 是独立仓库，CI runner 里不会自带这个目录。

content.content:
1→# aio部署文档
     2→
     3→## 前置
     4→
     5→### 1.在服务器上部署单节点k8集群
     6→服务器:
     7→- aio-service
     8→- aio-service-private
     9→
    10→参考文档: https://xaffine.yottastudios.com/workspace/72a9a619-37c2-4c1d-9c3c-737a1dc4cfae/dduiw0p7FoD0Eoiwm0_2o?mode=page
    11→
    12→
    13→### 2.在服务器上部署服务
    14→
    15→服务器:
    16→- aio-data
    17→- aio-data-private
    18→
    19→需要部署的服务:
    20→- mysql:8
    21→- rabbitmq:3
    22→- mongo:8
    23→- elasticsearch:7
    24→- postgres:16
    25→
    26→### 3.账号配置说明
    27→
    28→aio-data里的服务建账号时除了常规的有读写权限的账号, 还要配一个只读权限的账号。
    29→外网通用minio里也需要建一个只读账号。
    30→
    31→192.168.26.228 仅为限制ip的示例, 线上需替换
    32→privateip 为用户名密码的示例, 线上可替换
    33→
    34→#### MySQL 创建只读账号参考命令
    35→使用管理员用户连接到MySQL后执行:
    36→
    37→```bash
    38→
    39→CREATE USER 'privateip'@'192.168.26.228' IDENTIFIED BY 'privateip';
    40→
    41→GRANT SELECT ON apitable.* TO 'privateip'@'192.168.26.228';
    42→GRANT SELECT ON collabspace.* TO 'privateip'@'192.168.26.228';
    43→FLUSH PRIVILEGES;
    44→```
    45→
    46→#### PostgreSQL 创建只读账号参考命令
    47→连接到PostgreSQL服务后执行:
    48→
    49→```bash
    50→\c affine
    51→CREATE USER privateip WITH PASSWORD 'privateip';
    52→GRANT CONNECT ON DATABASE affine TO privateip;
    53→GRANT USAGE ON SCHEMA public TO privateip;
    54→GRANT SELECT ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA public TO privateip;
    55→ALTER DEFAULT PRIVILEGES IN SCHEMA public GRANT SELECT ON TABLES TO privateip;
    56→
    57→# outline postgres外网 -可编辑用户, 替换随机密码
    58→CREATE DATABASE outline;
    59→CREATE USER outline WITH PASSWORD '123456';
    60→GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON DATABASE outline TO outline;
    61→
    62→# outline postgres外网 -只读用户, 替换随机密码
    63→CREATE USER outlineprivate WITH PASSWORD 'privateip';
    64→GRANT CONNECT ON DATABASE outline TO outlineprivate;
    65→GRANT USAGE ON SCHEMA public TO outlineprivate;
    66→GRANT SELECT ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA public TO outlineprivate;
    67→ALTER DEFAULT PRIVILEGES IN SCHEMA public GRANT SELECT ON TABLES TO outlineprivate;
    68→
    69→# outline postgres内网 -可编辑用户, 替换随机密码
    70→CREATE DATABASE outline;
    71→CREATE USER outline WITH PASSWORD '123456';
    72→GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON DATABASE outline TO outline;
    73→```
    74→
    75→如需限制IP访问，需在pg_hba.conf文件中添加以下配置并重启PostgreSQL服务：
    76→
    77→pg_hba.conf可能的位置:
    78→- /var/lib/postgresql/data/pgdata
    79→- /etc/postgresql/16/main
    80→
    81→如果文件里有这行:
    82→```
    83→host all all all scram-sha-256
    84→```
    85→需要把这行放到文件最后, 并在这行之前配置:
    86→
    87→```
    88→host    affine    privateip    192.168.26.228/32    md5
    89→host    outline    outline    192.168.26.228/32    md5
    90→host    outline    outlineprivate    192.168.26.228/32    md5
    91→```
    92→
    93→#### MongoDB 创建只读账号参考命令
    94→连接到MongoDB服务后执行(注意实际执行时可能需要替换数据库名称为env里MONGODB_DB对应的值):
    95→
    96→```bash
    97→
    98→use apitable
    99→db.createUser({
   100→    user: "privateip",
   101→    pwd: "privateip",
   102→    roles: [{ role: "read", db: "apitable" }],
   103→    authenticationRestrictions: [
   104→        {
   105→            clientSource: ["192.168.26.228"]
   106→        }
   107→    ]
   108→})
   109→```
   110→
   111→#### 外网通用MinIO 创建只读账号参考
   112→在MinIO管理端中操作:
   113→1. 登录MinIO管理控制台
   114→2. 导航到"Identity" > "Users"，点击"Create User"创建新用户
   115→3. 填写用户名(如"privateip")和密码
   116→4. 创建用户后，可以应用预定义的只读Policy:
   117→   - 导航到"Identity" > "Users"，找到刚创建的用户
   118→   - 点击用户名，进入用户详情页
   119→   - 在"Policies"选项卡中，点击"Attach Policy"
   120→   - 选择系统预定义的"readonly"Policy，点击"Attach"
   121→
   122→如需添加IP限制，可以在管理端创建自定义Policy:
   123→1. 导航到"Identity" 上面的 "Policies"，点击"Create Policy"
   124→2. 填写Policy名称(如"readonly-ip-restricted")
   125→3. 在Policy编辑器中，输入以下JSON:
   126→
   127→```json
   128→{
   129→  "Version": "2012-10-17",
   130→  "Statement": [
   131→    {
   132→      "Effect": "Allow",
   133→      "Action": [
   134→        "s3:GetObject",
   135→        "s3:GetBucketLocation",
   136→        "s3:ListBucket"
   137→      ],
   138→      "Resource": [
   139→        "arn:aws:s3:::*",
   140→        "arn:aws:s3:::*/*"
   141→      ],
   142→      "Condition": {
   143→        "IpAddress": {
   144→          "aws:SourceIp": ["192.168.26.228/32"]
   145→        }
   146→      }
   147→    }
   148→  ]
   149→}
   150→```
   151→
   152→> 注意：上面的Policy中使用 `"arn:aws:s3:::*"` 和 `"arn:aws:s3:::*/*"` 表示允许访问所有bucket。如果需要限制只能访问特定bucket，请将Resource修改为：
   153→> ```
   154→> "Resource": [
   155→>   "arn:aws:s3:::bucket1",     // 允许访问bucket1
   156→>   "arn:aws:s3:::bucket1/*",   // 允许访问bucket1中的所有对象
   157→>   "arn:aws:s3:::bucket2",     // 允许访问bucket2
   158→>   "arn:aws:s3:::bucket2/*"    // 允许访问bucket2中的所有对象
   159→> ]
   160→> ```
   161→> 可以根据需要添加或减少bucket。每个bucket需要两行：一行用于bucket本身，一行用于bucket中的对象。
   162→
   163→4. 点击"Save"保存Policy
   164→5. 然后将此自定义Policy应用到用户:
   165→   - 导航到"Identity" > "Users"，找到目标用户
   166→   - 点击用户名，进入用户详情页
   167→   - 在"Policies"选项卡中，点击"Assign Policies"
   168→   - 选择刚创建的"readonly-ip-restricted"Policy，点击"Save"
   169→
   170→#### elasticsearch和rabbitmq不用建只读权限账号, 创建个正常账号
   171→
   172→### 4.域名解析配置
   173→
   174→#### aio-service
   175→- https://xcollabspace.yottastudios.com
   176→- https://xaffine-aio.yottastudios.com
   177→- https://xapitable-aio.yottastudios.com
   178→- https://xapitable-assets-aio.yottastudios.com
   179→- https://xoutline-aio.yottastudios.com
   180→
   181→#### aio-service-private
   182→- https://xcollabspace-private.yottastudios.com
   183→- https://xcollabspace-private-mirror.yottastudios.com
   184→- https://xaffine-private-aio.yottastudios.com
   185→- https://xaffine-private-aio-mirror.yottastudios.com
   186→- https://xapitable-private-aio.yottastudios.com
   187→- https://xapitable-private-aio-mirror.yottastudios.com
   188→- https://xapitable-private-assets-aio.yottastudios.com
   189→- https://xapitable-private-assets-aio-mirror.yottastudios.com
   190→- https://xoutline-private-aio.yottastudios.com
   191→- https://xoutline-private-aio-mirror.yottastudios.com
   192→
   193→需要确保aio-service-private能访问到https://xapitable-assets-aio.yottastudios.com
   194→
   195→### 5.初始化数据
   196→
   197→#### 5.1 minio
   198→
   199→翁斯坦手动上传到通用minio进行初始化
   200→<!-- 在内外网通用minio里都加一下名为assets的bucket(如果有就不用加了)
   201→
   202→将minio测试服(已初始化数据)的assets bucket的所有内容以增量更新的形式加到通用minio的assets bucket里
   203→
   204→minio测试服管理端: http://10.57.0.45:31901/
   205→
   206→账号密码: mimioadmin
   207→
   208→数据在10.57.0.45服务器的/mnt/data/minio/assets -->
   209→
   210→#### 5.2 mysql
   211→先复制apitable线上的ddl(内外网apitable的应该都一样):
   212→```bash
   213→mysqldump -u [MySQL用户名] -p -h [MySQL地址] -P [MySQL端口] --no-data apitable > apitable_ddl.sql
   214→```
   215→apitable_ddl.sql会保存到执行时的当前目录
   216→
   217→再在aio-data 和 aio-data-private跑给定的初始化sql
   218→
   219→### 6.GCR认证配置
   220→
   221→正式服拉镜像需要配置认证，保存认证信息到临时文件, aio-service和aio-service-private服务器上都要执行：
   222→
   223→```bash
   224→cat > /tmp/gcp-key.json << 'EOF'
   225→{
   226→"type": "service_account",
   227→...省略
   228→}
   229→EOF
   230→```
   231→
   232→配完 3. 创建namespace 后可删掉这个文件

   235→## 部署顺序
   236→先只在aio-service部署外网的看看所有服务能否正常使用
   237→
   238→再在aio-service-private上同时部署内网+内网只读外网服务。注意在内网服务器上需要同时部署两套系统：
   239→1. 内网可编辑服务 - 使用与外网相同的namespace(affine, apitable, collabspace)
   240→2. 内网只读外网镜像服务 - 使用-privatenamespace(affine-private, apitable-private, collabspace-private)
   241→
   242→## 1. 把所有kubernetes.yml下载到服务器
   243→
   244→### 1.1 在外网服务器(aio-service)上操作
   245→
   246→使用 aio-service 分支，部署外网服务：
   247→
   248→```bash
   249→git clone -b aio-service https://oauth2:mTVn_6baAR8Koua-ZGcB@pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/px/collabspace-prod/kubernetes.git
   250→cd kubernetes
   251→```
   252→
   253→### 1.2 在内网服务器(aio-service-private)上操作
   254→
   255→使用 aio-service-private 分支，部署内网服务和内网只读外网服务：
   256→
   257→```bash
   258→git clone -b aio-service-private https://oauth2:mTVn_6baAR8Koua-ZGcB@pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/px/collabspace-prod/kubernetes.git
   259→cd kubernetes
   260→```
   261→
   262→## 2. 创建pv路径
   263→
   264→### 2.1 在外网服务器(aio-service)上操作
   265→
   266→可以替换/mnt/data为任意路径, 如果替换的话注意也要替换下affine/affine-pv.yaml apitable/apitable-pv.yaml collabspace/collabspace-server-pv.yaml outline/outline-pv.yaml 里对应的路径
   267→
   268→```bash
   269→sudo mkdir -p /mnt/data/affine
   270→sudo chmod -R 755 /mnt/data/affine
   271→
   272→sudo mkdir -p /mnt/data/apitable
   273→sudo chmod -R 755 /mnt/data/apitable
   274→
   275→sudo mkdir -p /mnt/data/collabspace-server
   276→sudo chmod -R 755 /mnt/data/collabspace-server
   277→
   278→sudo mkdir -p /mnt/data/outline
   279→sudo chmod -R 755 /mnt/data/outline
   280→```
   281→
   282→### 2.2 在内网服务器(aio-service-private)上操作
   283→
   284→可以替换/mnt/data为任意路径, 如果替换的话注意也要替换下affine/affine-pv.yaml apitable/apitable-pv.yaml collabspace/collabspace-server-pv.yaml affine-private/affine-pv.yaml apitable-private/apitable-pv.yaml collabspace-private/collabspace-server-pv.yaml outline/outline-pv.yaml outline-private/outline-pv.yaml 里对应的路径
   285→
   286→```bash
   287→sudo mkdir -p /mnt/data/affine
   288→sudo chmod -R 755 /mnt/data/affine
   289→
   290→sudo mkdir -p /mnt/data/apitable
   291→sudo chmod -R 755 /mnt/data/apitable
   292→
   293→sudo mkdir -p /mnt/data/collabspace-server
   294→sudo chmod -R 755 /mnt/data/collabspace-server
   295→
   296→sudo mkdir -p /mnt/data/outline
   297→sudo chmod -R 755 /mnt/data/outline
   298→
   299→sudo mkdir -p /mnt/data/private/affine
   300→sudo chmod -R 755 /mnt/data/private/affine
   301→
   302→sudo mkdir -p /mnt/data/private/apitable
   303→sudo chmod -R 755 /mnt/data/private/apitable
   304→
   305→sudo mkdir -p /mnt/data/private/collabspace-server
   306→sudo chmod -R 755 /mnt/data/private/collabspace-server
   307→
   308→sudo mkdir -p /mnt/data/private/outline

   310→```

   312→## 3. 创建namespace
   313→
   314→### 3.1 在外网服务器(aio-service)上操作
   315→
   316→```bash
   317→kubectl apply -f affine/namespace.yaml
   318→kubectl apply -f apitable/namespace.yaml
   319→kubectl apply -f collabspace/namespace.yaml
   320→```
   321→
   322→#### 3.1.1 配置镜像拉取认证
   323→
   324→创建gcr-secret并绑定到各个namespace：
   325→
   326→```bash
   327→#affine
   328→kubectl create secret docker-registry gcr-secret \
   329→  --docker-server=us.gcr.io \
   330→  --docker-username=_json_key \
   331→  --docker-password="$(cat /tmp/gcp-key.json)" \
   332→  --docker-email=containerregistry@mocan-cloud.iam.gserviceaccount.com \
   333→  -n affine
   334→
   335→kubectl patch serviceaccount default -n affine -p '{"imagePullSecrets": [{"name": "gcr-secret"}]}'
   336→
   337→#apitable
   338→kubectl create secret docker-registry gcr-secret \
   339→  --docker-server=us.gcr.io \
   340→  --docker-username=_json_key \
   341→  --docker-password="$(cat /tmp/gcp-key.json)" \
   342→  --docker-email=containerregistry@mocan-cloud.iam.gserviceaccount.com \
   343→  -n apitable
   344→
   345→kubectl patch serviceaccount default -n apitable -p '{"imagePullSecrets": [{"name": "gcr-secret"}]}'
   346→
   347→#collabspace
   348→kubectl create secret docker-registry gcr-secret \
   349→  --docker-server=us.gcr.io \
   350→  --docker-username=_json_key \
   351→  --docker-password="$(cat /tmp/gcp-key.json)" \
   352→  --docker-email=containerregistry@mocan-cloud.iam.gserviceaccount.com \
   353→  -n collabspace
   354→
   355→kubectl patch serviceaccount default -n collabspace -p '{"imagePullSecrets": [{"name": "gcr-secret"}]}'
   356→```
   357→

   473→## 5. 编辑环境配置文件
   474→
   475→### 5.1 在外网服务器(aio-service)上配置
   476→
   477→#### 5.1.1 affine外网配置
   478→
   479→```bash
   480→sudo vi affine/.env
   481→```
   482→
   483→复制外网xaffine的.env到affine/.env，以下所有要替换的数据库均为aio-data服务器上部署的
   484→
   485→**affine要替换的环境变量:**
   486→- DATABASE_URL 替换postgres url
   487→- DB_PASS=postgres密码
   488→- AIO_JWT_VERIFY=https://xcollabspace.yottastudios.com/api/v1/jwtVerify
   489→- AIO_GET_APP_NODES_ROLE=https://xcollabspace.yottastudios.com/api/v1/node/role/getAppNodesRole
   490→- AFFINE_SERVER_EXTERNAL_URL=https://xaffine-aio.yottastudios.com
   491→
   492→**affine要注意的环境变量:**
   493→- OAUTH_OIDC_ISSUER的dex地址可以不管或者去掉, affine的认证会直接走collabspace
   494→
   495→其他的不变, minio还是用外网通用的, 同bucket
   496→
   497→#### 5.1.2 apitable外网配置
   498→
   499→```bash
   500→sudo vi apitable/.env
   501→```
   502→
   503→复制外网xapitable的.env到apitable/.env
   504→外网通用minio里创建bucket: assets, 已有的话就不创建了
   505→以下所有要替换的数据库均为aio-data服务器上部署的
   506→
   507→##### MINIO 需要替换
   508→- MINIO_ACCESS_KEY=外网通用minio
   509→- MINIO_SECRET_KEY=外网通用minio
   510→- AWS_ACCESS_KEY=外网通用minio
   511→- AWS_ACCESS_SECRET=外网通用minio
   512→- AWS_ENDPOINT=外网通用minio url
   513→
   514→##### MYSQL 需要替换
   515→- MYSQL_HOST=
   516→- MYSQL_PASSWORD=
   517→- MYSQL_PORT=
   518→- MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=
   519→- MYSQL_USERNAME=
   520→
   521→##### REDIS 需要替换
   522→- REDIS_PASSWORD=这个替换为随机字符串, 后续redis会在k8s里自动用这个密码部署
   523→
   524→##### RabbitMQ 需要替换
   525→- RABBITMQ_HOST=
   526→- RABBITMQ_PASSWORD=
   527→- RABBITMQ_PORT=
   528→- RABBITMQ_USERNAME=
   529→
   530→##### MONGODB 需要替换
   531→- MONGODB_HOST=
   532→- MONGODB_PORT=
   533→- MONGODB_DB=apitable
   534→- MONGODB_USERNAME=
   535→- MONGODB_PASSWORD=
   536→- MONGODB_AUTH_SOURCE=apitable
   537→
   538→##### ES (elasticsearch) 需要替换
   539→- ES_ENABLED=true
   540→- ES_HOST=
   541→- ES_PORT=
   542→
   543→##### 其他配置 改成指定值 没有的直接新增
   544→- SERVER_DOMAIN=https://xapitable-aio.yottastudios.com
   545→- APITABLE_HOST=https://xapitable-aio.yottastudios.com
   546→- OUTLINE_HOST=留空或不改, 以后填
   547→- APITABLE_URL=https://xapitable-aio.yottastudios.com
   548→- ASSET_CACHE_URL=https://xapitable-assets-aio.yottastudios.com/assets/
   549→- AFFINE_HOST=https://xaffine-aio.yottastudios.com
   550→- ASSET_DOMAIN=https://xapitable-aio.yottastudios.com
   551→- ENABLE_AIO=true
   552→- COLLABSPACE_GRPC_ADDRESS=static://collabspace-server-svc.collabspace:8084
   553→- NEST_GRPC_URL=0.0.0.0:3334
   554→- SOCKET_GRPC_URL=0.0.0.0:3007
   555→
   556→#### 5.1.3 collabspace外网配置
   557→
   558→```bash
   559→sudo vi collabspace/.env
   560→```
   561→
   562→直接用collabspace/.env 然后替换以下内容, 没提到的不用改
   563→以下所有要替换的数据库均为aio-data服务器上部署的
   564→
   565→##### MySQL 需要替换
   566→- MYSQL_HOST=
   567→- MYSQL_PORT=
   568→- MYSQL_USERNAME=
   569→- MYSQL_PASSWORD=
   570→
   571→##### RabbitMQ 需要替换, 同5.1.2 apitable外网的账密
   572→- RABBITMQ_HOST=
   573→- RABBITMQ_USERNAME=
   574→- RABBITMQ_PASSWORD=
   575→
   576→##### MinIO 需要替换
   577→- MINIO_ENDPOINT=外网通用minio url
   578→- MINIO_ACCESS_KEY=外网通用minio
   579→- MINIO_SECRET_KEY=外网通用minio
   580→
   581→##### 其他配置
   582→- PROJECT_ENV=collabspace
   583→- ASSET_DOMAIN=外网通用minio url
   584→- SERVER_DOMAIN=https://xcollabspace.yottastudios.com
   585→- AFFINE_HOST=https://xaffine-aio.yottastudios.com
   586→
   587→- OA_CLIENT_HOST=https://oa-chn.xinyoudi.com
   588→- OA_CORE_HOST=https://oa-core.xinyoudi.com
   589→- OA_CORE_CLIENT_ID=私发的Client ID
   590→- OA_CORE_CLIENT_SECRET=私发的Client secret
   591→- OA_CLIENT_HOST_CALENDAR=https://oa-chn.xinyoudi.com
   592→- APITABLE_HOST=https://xapitable-aio.yottastudios.com
   593→
   594→#### 5.1.4 outline外网配置
   595→
   596→```bash
   597→sudo vi outline/.env
   598→```
   599→
   600→复制外网xapitable的outline的.env, 并修改以下内容
   601→以下所有要替换的数据库均为aio-data服务器上部署的
   602→
   603→##### PostgreSQL 需要替换
   604→- DATABASE_URL=postgres://outline:123456@postgres地址:端口/outline
   605→- DATABASE_URL_TEST=postgres://outline:123456@postgres地址:端口/outline
   606→
   607→##### Redis 需要替换，密码同apitable的REDIS_PASSWORD
   608→- REDIS_URL=redis://:密码@redis:6379
   609→
   610→##### MinIO 需要替换
   611→- AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=外网通用minio账号
   612→- AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=外网通用minio密码
   613→- AWS_S3_UPLOAD_BUCKET_URL=外网通用minio url
   614→- AWS_S3_UPLOAD_BUCKET_NAME=xoutline
   615→
   616→##### 其他配置 改成指定值
   617→- URL=https://xoutline-aio.yottastudios.com
   618→- COLLABORATION_URL=https://xoutline-aio.yottastudios.com
   619→- APITABLE_HOST=https://xapitable-aio.yottastudios.com
   620→- SECRET_KEY=用原有的不变
   621→- UTILS_SECRET=用原有的不变
   622→
   623→##### OIDC不用了, 改成指定值防止启动时报错
   624→OIDC_CLIENT_ID=1
   625→OIDC_CLIENT_SECRET=1
   626→OIDC_AUTH_URI=localhost
   627→OIDC_TOKEN_URI=localhost
   628→OIDC_USERINFO_URI=localhost
   629→
   630→同时需要在apitable的.env中添加或修改:
   631→- OUTLINE_HOST=https://xoutline-aio.yottastudios.com

   712→- COLLABSPACE_GRPC_ADDRESS=static://collabspace-server-svc.collabspace:8084
   713→- NEST_GRPC_URL=0.0.0.0:3334
   714→- SOCKET_GRPC_URL=0.0.0.0:3007
   715→
   716→##### 5.2.1.3 collabspace内网配置
   717→
   718→```bash
   719→sudo vi collabspace/.env
   720→```
   721→
   722→直接用collabspace/.env 然后替换以下内容, 没提到的不用改
   723→以下所有要替换的数据库均为aio-data-private服务器上部署的
   724→
   725→###### MySQL 需要替换
   726→- MYSQL_HOST=
   727→- MYSQL_PORT=
   728→- MYSQL_USERNAME=
   729→- MYSQL_PASSWORD=
   730→
   731→###### RabbitMQ 需要替换, 同 5.2.1.2 apitable-内网的账密
   732→- RABBITMQ_HOST=
   733→- RABBITMQ_USERNAME=
   734→- RABBITMQ_PASSWORD=
   735→
   736→###### MinIO 需要替换
   737→- MINIO_ENDPOINT=内网通用minio url
   738→- MINIO_ACCESS_KEY=内网通用minio
   739→- MINIO_SECRET_KEY=内网通用minio
   740→
   741→###### 其他配置
   742→- PROJECT_ENV=collabspace-private
   743→- ASSET_DOMAIN=内网通用minio url
   744→- SERVER_DOMAIN=https://xcollabspace-private.yottastudios.com
   745→- AFFINE_HOST=https://xaffine-private-aio.yottastudios.com
   746→
   747→- MATTERMOST_CLIENT_ID=猿飞内网私发
   748→- MATTERMOST_CLIENT_SECRET=猿飞内网私发
   749→- MATTERMOST_URL=复制内网xapitable-private的.env的同字段值
   750→- MATTERMOST_BROWSER_URL=复制内网xapitable-private的.env的同字段值
   751→- OA_CLIENT_HOST_CALENDAR=复制内网echo-private的external.yml的host-calendar:一行的值, 应该是内网转发到外网http://oa-chn.xinyoudi.com的转发地址
   752→- APITABLE_HOST=https://xapitable-private-aio.yottastudios.com
   753→
   754→###### 5.2.1.4 outline内网配置
   755→
   756→```bash
   757→sudo vi outline/.env
   758→```
   759→
   760→复制内网xapitable-private的outline的.env, 并修改以下内容
   761→以下所有要替换的数据库均为aio-data-private服务器上部署的
   762→
   763→##### PostgreSQL 需要替换
   764→- DATABASE_URL=postgres://outline:123456@postgres地址:端口/outline
   765→- DATABASE_URL_TEST=postgres://outline:123456@postgres地址:端口/outline
   766→
   767→##### Redis 需要替换，密码同apitable的REDIS_PASSWORD
   768→- REDIS_URL=redis://:密码@redis:6379
   769→
   770→##### MinIO 需要替换, 如果通用minio没有xoutline这个bucket, 需要新建一下
   771→- AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=内网通用minio账号
   772→- AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=内网通用minio密码
   773→- AWS_S3_UPLOAD_BUCKET_URL=内网通用minio url
   774→- AWS_S3_UPLOAD_BUCKET_NAME=xoutline
   775→
   776→##### 其他配置 改成指定值

   778→- COLLABORATION_URL=https://xoutline-private-aio.yottastudios.com
   779→- APITABLE_HOST=https://xapitable-private-aio.yottastudios.com
   780→- SECRET_KEY=用原有的不变
   781→- UTILS_SECRET=用原有的不变
   782→
   783→##### OIDC不用了, 改成指定值防止启动时报错
   784→OIDC_CLIENT_ID=1

   786→OIDC_AUTH_URI=localhost
   787→OIDC_TOKEN_URI=localhost
   788→OIDC_USERINFO_URI=localhost
   789→
   790→ 
   791→同时需要在apitable的.env中添加或修改:
   792→- OUTLINE_HOST=https://xoutline-private-aio.yottastudios.com
   793→
   794→#### 5.2.2 内网只读镜像服务配置
   795→
   796→##### 5.2.2.1 affine内网只读镜像配置
   797→
   798→```bash
   799→sudo vi affine-private/.env
   800→```
   801→

   803→以下所有要替换的数据库均为aio-data服务器上部署的, 限制为只读权限的账号
   804→
   805→**affine要替换的环境变量:**

   809→- AIO_GET_APP_NODES_ROLE=https://xcollabspace-private-mirror.yottastudios.com/api/v1/node/role/getAppNodesRole

   817→
   818→##### 5.2.2.2 apitable内网只读镜像配置

   843→
   844→###### RabbitMQ 需要替换, 这个是内网单独通过k8s起的rabbitmq, 保证能连上不报错, 无业务上的应用

   848→- RABBITMQ_USERNAME=apitable

   851→###### MONGODB 需要替换 外网只读权限账密

   859→###### ES (elasticsearch) 需要替换, 这个也是内网单独通过k8s起的elasticsearch, 保证能连上不报错, 无业务上的应用
   860→- ES_ENABLED=true

   863→
   864→###### 其他配置 改成指定值 没有的直接新增
   865→- SERVER_DOMAIN=https://xapitable-private-aio-mirror.yottastudios.com
   866→- APITABLE_HOST=https://xapitable-private-aio-mirror.yottastudios.com
   867→- OUTLINE_HOST=留空或不改, 以后填
   868→- APITABLE_URL=https://xapitable-private-aio-mirror.yottastudios.com
   869→- ASSET_CACHE_URL=https://xapitable-private-assets-aio-mirror.yottastudios.com/assets/
   870→- AFFINE_HOST=https://xaffine-private-aio-mirror.yottastudios.com
   871→- ASSET_DOMAIN=https://xapitable-private-aio-mirror.yottastudios.com
   872→- ENABLE_AIO=true

   874→- NEST_GRPC_URL=0.0.0.0:3334

   876→
   877→##### 5.2.2.3 collabspace内网只读镜像配置
   878→
   879→```bash
   880→sudo vi collabspace-private/.env
   881→```
   882→
   883→复制 5.1.3 collabspace-外网 编辑后 的.env到collabspace-private/.env
   884→以下所有要替换的数据库均为aio-data服务器上部署的, 限制为只读权限的账号

   886→###### MySQL 需要替换 外网只读权限账密
   887→- MYSQL_HOST=
   888→- MYSQL_PORT=
   889→- MYSQL_USERNAME=
   890→- MYSQL_PASSWORD=
   891→
   892→###### RabbitMQ 需要替换, 这个是内网单独通过k8s起的rabbitmq, 保证能连上不报错, 无业务上的应用
   893→- RABBITMQ_HOST=rabbitmq
   894→- RABBITMQ_USERNAME=apitable

   900→- MINIO_ACCESS_KEY=外网通用minio, 只读账密
   901→- MINIO_SECRET_KEY=外网通用minio, 只读账密
   902→
   903→###### 其他配置
   904→- PROJECT_ENV=collabspace-private-mirror
   905→- ASSET_DOMAIN=外网通用minio url
   906→- SERVER_DOMAIN=https://xcollabspace-private-mirror.yottastudios.com
   907→- AFFINE_HOST=https://xaffine-private-aio-mirror.yottastudios.com
   908→- AIPTABEL_BACKEND_GRPC_ADDRESS=static://backend-server.apitable-private:8083
   909→
   910→- MATTERMOST_CLIENT_ID=猿飞内网私发
   911→- MATTERMOST_CLIENT_SECRET=猿飞内网私发
   912→- MATTERMOST_URL=复制内网xapitable-private的.env的同字段值
   913→- MATTERMOST_BROWSER_URL=复制内网xapitable-private的.env的同字段值
   914→- OA_CLIENT_HOST_CALENDAR=复制内网echo-private的external.yml的host-calendar:一行的值, 应该是内网转发到外网http://oa-chn.xinyoudi.com的转发地址
   915→- APITABLE_HOST=https://xapitable-private-aio-mirror.yottastudios.com
   916→
   917→##### 5.2.2.4 outline内网只读镜像配置
   918→

   921→```
   922→
   923→复制外网xapitable的outline的.env, 并修改以下内容
   924→以下所有要替换的数据库均为aio-data服务器上部署的, 限制为只读权限的账号
   925→
   926→###### PostgreSQL 需要替换 外网只读权限账密
   927→- DATABASE_URL=postgres://outlineprivate:privateip@postgres地址:端口/outline
   928→- DATABASE_URL_TEST=postgres://outlineprivate:privateip@postgres地址:端口/outline
   929→
   930→##### Redis 需要替换，密码同apitable的REDIS_PASSWORD
   931→- REDIS_URL=redis://:密码@redis:6379
   932→
   933→###### MinIO 需要替换
   934→- AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=外网通用minio, 只读账密
   935→- AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=外网通用minio, 只读账密
   936→- AWS_S3_UPLOAD_BUCKET_URL=https://xminio-private-mirror.yottastudios.com
   937→- AWS_S3_UPLOAD_BUCKET_NAME=xoutline-aio
   938→
   939→###### 其他配置 改成指定值
   940→- URL=https://xoutline-private-aio-mirror.yottastudios.com
   941→- COLLABORATION_URL=https://xoutline-private-aio-mirror.yottastudios.com
   942→- APITABLE_HOST=https://xapitable-private-aio-mirror.yottastudios.com
   943→- SECRET_KEY=用原有的不变
   944→- UTILS_SECRET=用原有的不变
   945→
   946→##### OIDC不用了, 改成指定值防止启动时报错
   947→OIDC_CLIENT_ID=1
   948→OIDC_CLIENT_SECRET=1
   949→OIDC_AUTH_URI=localhost
   950→OIDC_TOKEN_URI=localhost
   951→OIDC_USERINFO_URI=localhost
   952→
   953→同时需要在apitable-private的.env中添加:
   954→- OUTLINE_HOST=https://xoutline-private-aio-mirror.yottastudios.com
   955→
   956→## 6. 从.env创建ConfigMap
   957→
   958→### 6.1 在外网服务器(aio-service)上操作
   959→
   960→```bash
   961→kubectl create configmap affine-configmap --from-env-file=affine/.env -n affine
   962→kubectl create configmap apitable-configmap --from-env-file=apitable/.env -n apitable
   963→kubectl create configmap collabspace-configmap --from-env-file=collabspace/.env -n collabspace
   964→kubectl create configmap outline-configmap --from-env-file=outline/.env -n apitable
   965→```
   966→
   967→### 6.2 在内网服务器(aio-service-private)上操作
   968→
   969→#### 6.2.1 为内网可编辑服务创建ConfigMap
   970→
   971→```bash
   972→kubectl create configmap affine-configmap --from-env-file=affine/.env -n affine
   973→kubectl create configmap apitable-configmap --from-env-file=apitable/.env -n apitable
   974→kubectl create configmap collabspace-configmap --from-env-file=collabspace/.env -n collabspace
   975→kubectl create configmap outline-configmap --from-env-file=outline/.env -n apitable
   976→```
   977→
   978→#### 6.2.2 为内网只读镜像服务创建ConfigMap
   979→
   980→```bash
   981→kubectl create configmap affine-configmap --from-env-file=affine-private/.env -n affine-private
   982→kubectl create configmap apitable-configmap --from-env-file=apitable-private/.env -n apitable-private
   983→kubectl create configmap collabspace-configmap --from-env-file=collabspace-private/.env -n collabspace-private
   984→kubectl create configmap outline-configmap --from-env-file=outline-private/.env -n apitable-private
   985→```
   986→
   987→## 7. 部署应用
   988→
   989→### 7.1 在外网服务器(aio-service)上操作
   990→
   991→```bash
   992→kubectl apply -f affine/
   993→kubectl apply -f apitable/
   994→kubectl apply -f collabspace/
   995→kubectl apply -f outline/
   996→```
   997→
   998→### 7.2 在内网服务器(aio-service-private)上操作
   999→
  1000→#### 7.2.1 部署内网可编辑服务
  1001→
  1002→```bash
  1003→kubectl apply -f affine/
  1004→kubectl apply -f apitable/
  1005→kubectl apply -f collabspace/
  1006→kubectl apply -f outline/
  1007→```
  1008→
  1009→#### 7.2.2 部署内网只读镜像服务
  1010→
  1011→```bash
  1012→kubectl apply -f affine-private/
  1013→kubectl apply -f apitable-private/
  1014→kubectl apply -f collabspace-private/
  1015→kubectl apply -f outline-private/
  1016→```
  1017→
  1018→## 8. 逐个验证部署状态
  1019→
  1020→### 8.1 在外网服务器(aio-service)上操作
  1021→
  1022→```bash
  1023→kubectl get po -n affine
  1024→kubectl get po -n apitable
  1025→kubectl get po -n collabspace
  1026→```
  1027→
  1028→注意：outline的pod会在apitable的namespace中
  1029→
  1030→### 8.2 在内网服务器(aio-service-private)上操作
  1031→
  1032→#### 8.2.1 验证内网可编辑服务状态
  1033→
  1034→```bash
  1035→kubectl get po -n affine
  1036→kubectl get po -n apitable
  1037→kubectl get po -n collabspace
  1038→```
  1039→
  1040→#### 8.2.2 验证内网只读镜像服务状态
  1041→
  1042→```bash
  1043→kubectl get po -n affine-private
  1044→kubectl get po -n apitable-private
  1045→kubectl get po -n collabspace-private
  1046→```
  1047→
  1048→注意：outline-private的pod会在apitable-private的namespace中
  1049→
  1050→## 9. 部署gateway
  1051→
  1052→gateway具体配置:
  1053→- 外网: https://pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/px/collabspace-prod/gateway/-/tree/aio-service
  1054→- 内网: https://pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/px/collabspace-prod/gateway/-/tree/aio-service-private
  1055→
  1056→如果需要调整,
  1057→在对应分支改动后会自动打包镜像
  1058→
  1059→```bash
  1060→kubectl apply -f gateway/gateway.yml
  1061→```

file.content:
# aio部署文档

## 前置

### 1.在服务器上部署单节点k8集群
服务器:
- aio-service
- aio-service-private

参考文档: https://xaffine.yottastudios.com/workspace/72a9a619-37c2-4c1d-9c3c-737a1dc4cfae/dduiw0p7FoD0Eoiwm0_2o?mode=page


### 2.在服务器上部署服务

服务器:
- aio-data
- aio-data-private

需要部署的服务:
- mysql:8
- rabbitmq:3
- mongo:8
- elasticsearch:7
- postgres:16

### 3.账号配置说明

aio-data里的服务建账号时除了常规的有读写权限的账号, 还要配一个只读权限的账号。
外网通用minio里也需要建一个只读账号。

192.168.26.228 仅为限制ip的示例, 线上需替换
privateip 为用户名密码的示例, 线上可替换

#### MySQL 创建只读账号参考命令
使用管理员用户连接到MySQL后执行:

```bash

CREATE USER 'privateip'@'192.168.26.228' IDENTIFIED BY 'privateip';

GRANT SELECT ON apitable.* TO 'privateip'@'192.168.26.228';
GRANT SELECT ON collabspace.* TO 'privateip'@'192.168.26.228';
FLUSH PRIVILEGES;
```

#### PostgreSQL 创建只读账号参考命令
连接到PostgreSQL服务后执行:

```bash
\c affine
CREATE USER privateip WITH PASSWORD 'privateip';
GRANT CONNECT ON DATABASE affine TO privateip;
GRANT USAGE ON SCHEMA public TO privateip;
GRANT SELECT ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA public TO privateip;
ALTER DEFAULT PRIVILEGES IN SCHEMA public GRANT SELECT ON TABLES TO privateip;

# outline postgres外网 -可编辑用户, 替换随机密码
CREATE DATABASE outline;
CREATE USER outline WITH PASSWORD '123456';
GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON DATABASE outline TO outline;

# outline postgres外网 -只读用户, 替换随机密码
CREATE USER outlineprivate WITH PASSWORD 'privateip';
GRANT CONNECT ON DATABASE outline TO outlineprivate;
GRANT USAGE ON SCHEMA public TO outlineprivate;
GRANT SELECT ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA public TO outlineprivate;
ALTER DEFAULT PRIVILEGES IN SCHEMA public GRANT SELECT ON TABLES TO outlineprivate;

# outline postgres内网 -可编辑用户, 替换随机密码
CREATE DATABASE outline;
CREATE USER outline WITH PASSWORD '123456';
GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON DATABASE outline TO outline;
```

如需限制IP访问，需在pg_hba.conf文件中添加以下配置并重启PostgreSQL服务：

pg_hba.conf可能的位置:
- /var/lib/postgresql/data/pgdata
- /etc/postgresql/16/main

如果文件里有这行:
```
host all all all scram-sha-256
```
需要把这行放到文件最后, 并在这行之前配置:

```
host    affine    privateip    192.168.26.228/32    md5
host    outline    outline    192.168.26.228/32    md5
host    outline    outlineprivate    192.168.26.228/32    md5
```

#### MongoDB 创建只读账号参考命令
连接到MongoDB服务后执行(注意实际执行时可能需要替换数据库名称为env里MONGODB_DB对应的值):

```bash

use apitable
db.createUser({
    user: "privateip",
    pwd: "privateip",
    roles: [{ role: "read", db: "apitable" }],
    authenticationRestrictions: [
        {
            clientSource: ["192.168.26.228"]
        }
    ]
})
```

#### 外网通用MinIO 创建只读账号参考
在MinIO管理端中操作:
1. 登录MinIO管理控制台
2. 导航到"Identity" > "Users"，点击"Create User"创建新用户
3. 填写用户名(如"privateip")和密码
4. 创建用户后，可以应用预定义的只读Policy:
   - 导航到"Identity" > "Users"，找到刚创建的用户
   - 点击用户名，进入用户详情页
   - 在"Policies"选项卡中，点击"Attach Policy"
   - 选择系统预定义的"readonly"Policy，点击"Attach"

如需添加IP限制，可以在管理端创建自定义Policy:
1. 导航到"Identity" 上面的 "Policies"，点击"Create Policy"
2. 填写Policy名称(如"readonly-ip-restricted")
3. 在Policy编辑器中，输入以下JSON:

```json
{
  "Version": "2012-10-17",
  "Statement": [
    {
      "Effect": "Allow",
      "Action": [
        "s3:GetObject",
        "s3:GetBucketLocation",
        "s3:ListBucket"
      ],
      "Resource": [
        "arn:aws:s3:::*",
        "arn:aws:s3:::*/*"
      ],
      "Condition": {
        "IpAddress": {
          "aws:SourceIp": ["192.168.26.228/32"]
        }
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

> 注意：上面的Policy中使用 `"arn:aws:s3:::*"` 和 `"arn:aws:s3:::*/*"` 表示允许访问所有bucket。如果需要限制只能访问特定bucket，请将Resource修改为：
> ```
> "Resource": [
>   "arn:aws:s3:::bucket1",     // 允许访问bucket1
>   "arn:aws:s3:::bucket1/*",   // 允许访问bucket1中的所有对象
>   "arn:aws:s3:::bucket2",     // 允许访问bucket2
>   "arn:aws:s3:::bucket2/*"    // 允许访问bucket2中的所有对象
> ]
> ```
> 可以根据需要添加或减少bucket。每个bucket需要两行：一行用于bucket本身，一行用于bucket中的对象。

4. 点击"Save"保存Policy
5. 然后将此自定义Policy应用到用户:
   - 导航到"Identity" > "Users"，找到目标用户
   - 点击用户名，进入用户详情页
   - 在"Policies"选项卡中，点击"Assign Policies"
   - 选择刚创建的"readonly-ip-restricted"Policy，点击"Save"

### 6.GCR认证配置

正式服拉镜像需要配置认证，保存认证信息到临时文件, aio-service和aio-service-private服务器上都要执行：

```bash
{
"type": "service_account",
```

## 部署顺序
先只在aio-service部署外网的看看所有服务能否正常使用

再在aio-service-private上同时部署内网+内网只读外网服务。注意在内网服务器上需要同时部署两套系统：
1. 内网可编辑服务 - 使用与外网相同的namespace(affine, apitable, collabspace)
2. 内网只读外网镜像服务 - 使用-privatenamespace(affine-private, apitable-private, collabspace-private)

## 1. 把所有kubernetes.yml下载到服务器

### 1.1 在外网服务器(aio-service)上操作

使用 aio-service 分支，部署外网服务：

```bash
git clone -b aio-service https://oauth2:mTVn_6baAR8Koua-ZGcB@pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/px/collabspace-prod/kubernetes.git
cd kubernetes
```

### 1.2 在内网服务器(aio-service-private)上操作

使用 aio-service-private 分支，部署内网服务和内网只读外网服务：

```bash
git clone -b aio-service-private https://oauth2:mTVn_6baAR8Koua-ZGcB@pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/px/collabspace-prod/kubernetes.git
cd kubernetes
```

## 2. 创建pv路径

### 2.1 在外网服务器(aio-service)上操作

可以替换/mnt/data为任意路径, 如果替换的话注意也要替换下affine/affine-pv.yaml apitable/apitable-pv.yaml collabspace/collabspace-server-pv.yaml outline/outline-pv.yaml 里对应的路径

```bash
sudo mkdir -p /mnt/data/affine
sudo chmod -R 755 /mnt/data/affine

sudo chmod -R 755 /mnt/data/apitable

sudo mkdir -p /mnt/data/collabspace-server
sudo chmod -R 755 /mnt/data/collabspace-server

sudo chmod -R 755 /mnt/data/outline
```

### 2.2 在内网服务器(aio-service-private)上操作

可以替换/mnt/data为任意路径, 如果替换的话注意也要替换下affine/affine-pv.yaml apitable/apitable-pv.yaml collabspace/collabspace-server-pv.yaml affine-private/affine-pv.yaml apitable-private/apitable-pv.yaml collabspace-private/collabspace-server-pv.yaml outline/outline-pv.yaml outline-private/outline-pv.yaml 里对应的路径

```bash
sudo mkdir -p /mnt/data/affine

sudo mkdir -p /mnt/data/apitable
sudo chmod -R 755 /mnt/data/apitable

sudo mkdir -p /mnt/data/collabspace-server
sudo chmod -R 755 /mnt/data/collabspace-server

sudo chmod -R 755 /mnt/data/outline

sudo mkdir -p /mnt/data/private/apitable
```

## 3. 创建namespace

### 3.1 在外网服务器(aio-service)上操作

```bash
kubectl apply -f affine/namespace.yaml
kubectl apply -f apitable/namespace.yaml
kubectl apply -f collabspace/namespace.yaml
```

#### 3.1.1 配置镜像拉取认证

创建gcr-secret并绑定到各个namespace：

```bash
#affine
kubectl create secret docker-registry gcr-secret \
  --docker-server=us.gcr.io \
  --docker-username=_json_key \
  --docker-password="$(cat /tmp/gcp-key.json)" \
  --docker-email=containerregistry@mocan-cloud.iam.gserviceaccount.com \
  -n affine

kubectl patch serviceaccount default -n affine -p '{"imagePullSecrets": [{"name": "gcr-secret"}]}'

#apitable
kubectl create secret docker-registry gcr-secret \
  --docker-server=us.gcr.io \
  --docker-username=_json_key \
  --docker-password="$(cat /tmp/gcp-key.json)" \
  --docker-email=containerregistry@mocan-cloud.iam.gserviceaccount.com \
  -n apitable

kubectl patch serviceaccount default -n apitable -p '{"imagePullSecrets": [{"name": "gcr-secret"}]}'

#collabspace
kubectl create secret docker-registry gcr-secret \
  --docker-server=us.gcr.io \
  --docker-username=_json_key \
  --docker-password="$(cat /tmp/gcp-key.json)" \
  --docker-email=containerregistry@mocan-cloud.iam.gserviceaccount.com \
  -n collabspace

kubectl patch serviceaccount default -n collabspace -p '{"imagePullSecrets": [{"name": "gcr-secret"}]}'
```

## 6. 从.env创建ConfigMap

### 6.1 在外网服务器(aio-service)上操作

```bash
kubectl create configmap affine-configmap --from-env-file=affine/.env -n affine
kubectl create configmap apitable-configmap --from-env-file=apitable/.env -n apitable
kubectl create configmap collabspace-configmap --from-env-file=collabspace/.env -n collabspace
kubectl create configmap outline-configmap --from-env-file=outline/.env -n apitable
```

### 6.2 在内网服务器(aio-service-private)上操作

#### 6.2.1 为内网可编辑服务创建ConfigMap

```bash
kubectl create configmap affine-configmap --from-env-file=affine/.env -n affine
kubectl create configmap apitable-configmap --from-env-file=apitable/.env -n apitable
kubectl create configmap collabspace-configmap --from-env-file=collabspace/.env -n collabspace
kubectl create configmap outline-configmap --from-env-file=outline/.env -n apitable
```

#### 6.2.2 为内网只读镜像服务创建ConfigMap

```bash
kubectl create configmap affine-configmap --from-env-file=affine-private/.env -n affine-private
kubectl create configmap apitable-configmap --from-env-file=apitable-private/.env -n apitable-private
kubectl create configmap collabspace-configmap --from-env-file=collabspace-private/.env -n collabspace-private
kubectl create configmap outline-configmap --from-env-file=outline-private/.env -n apitable-private
```

## 7. 部署应用

### 7.1 在外网服务器(aio-service)上操作

```bash
kubectl apply -f affine/
kubectl apply -f apitable/
kubectl apply -f collabspace/
kubectl apply -f outline/
```

### 7.2 在内网服务器(aio-service-private)上操作

#### 7.2.1 部署内网可编辑服务

```bash
kubectl apply -f affine/
kubectl apply -f apitable/
kubectl apply -f collabspace/
kubectl apply -f outline/
```

#### 7.2.2 部署内网只读镜像服务

```bash
kubectl apply -f affine-private/
kubectl apply -f apitable-private/
kubectl apply -f collabspace-private/
kubectl apply -f outline-private/
```

## 8. 逐个验证部署状态

### 8.1 在外网服务器(aio-service)上操作

```bash
kubectl get po -n affine
kubectl get po -n apitable
kubectl get po -n collabspace
```

注意：outline的pod会在apitable的namespace中

### 8.2 在内网服务器(aio-service-private)上操作

#### 8.2.1 验证内网可编辑服务状态

```bash
kubectl get po -n affine
kubectl get po -n apitable
kubectl get po -n collabspace
```

#### 8.2.2 验证内网只读镜像服务状态

```bash
kubectl get po -n affine-private
kubectl get po -n apitable-private
kubectl get po -n collabspace-private
```

注意：outline-private的pod会在apitable-private的namespace中

## 9. 部署gateway

gateway具体配置:
- 外网: https://pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/px/collabspace-prod/gateway/-/tree/aio-service
- 内网: https://pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/px/collabspace-prod/gateway/-/tree/aio-service-private

如果需要调整,
在对应分支改动后会自动打包镜像

```bash
kubectl apply -f gateway/gateway.yml
```

content.thinking:
Now I understand the pattern. The kubernetes repo is the deployment repo. For the test environment, the CI in surveyking should NOT clone the kubernetes repo - instead, the kubernetes yaml files should be committed to the kubernetes repo, and deployment is done by applying them on the server directly or through a separate CI pipeline.

Looking at the collabspace pattern:
1. ConfigMap is created from `.env` file on the server, not from a yaml file
2. The deployment yaml references configMapRef
3. The CI deploy step just does `kubectl rollout restart`

But wait - for the test environment (testserver branch), the current CI does `kubectl rollout restart`. This means the k8s resources should already be applied on the test server. 

The real issue is that the user's namespace didn't exist because the initial setup was never done. I'm weighing two approaches: either keep `kubectl apply` in the CI pipeline as an idempotent safety measure (though the ConfigMap should still be created from the server's `.env` file rather than a yaml), or do the one-time setup manually and let CI just handle the rollout restart.

Looking at how other projects handle this, the pattern seems to be that CI only does `kubectl rollout restart` for test deployments, with all initial setup done manually. Since this is a fresh deployment, the kubernetes manifests should live in the kubernetes repo, but the challenge is that the surveyking CI only has access to its own repo—so either the CI needs to pull from the kubernetes repo separately, or we accept that the first-time setup is a manual step. the yaml files to the kubernetes repo and have CI handle both the initial apply and rollout restart, since kubectl apply is idempotent and automatically syncs config changes. The ConfigMap can stay as a yaml file in the repo rather than using an .env approach like collabspace does, keeping things simpler for surveyking.

But looking at how collabspace actually does it in their deploy docs, the pattern is clearer: initial setup happens manually on the server with a one-time clone and apply, then CI just triggers rollout restarts for deployments. So I should revert the CI to that simpler approach and document the manual setup step for the user. The user wants me to review the kubernetes repo carefully before adding surveyking content, and I've already created the necessary files. I need to verify they follow the team's conventions, ensure the CI pipeline is correct, and have the user commit these changes. The MySQL service in the default namespace should be accessible via `mysql.default:3306` in the ConfigMap, which I've already configured correctly.

Now I'm checking whether the ConfigMap is using the correct Spring Boot property names for the database configuration.

  h2:
    console:
      enabled: true
  datasource:
    #    username: sa
    #    password: sa

      continue-on-error: true
mybatis-plus:
  configuration:
    log-impl: org.apache.ibatis.logging.stdout.StdOutImpl
    call-setters-on-nulls: false
  global-config:
    db-config:
      logic-delete-field: deleted

1→version: 1.10.0
     2→spring:
     3→  application:
     4→    name: survey
     5→  profiles:
     6→    active: @activeProfile@ # maven 配置
     7→#    active: ${activeProfile} # gradle 配置
     8→  mvc:
     9→    async:
    10→      request-timeout: -1
    11→    static-path-pattern: /notfound # 覆盖默认的 /**
    12→    throw-exception-if-no-handler-found: true
    13→    pathmatch:
    14→      matching-strategy: ant_path_matcher
    15→  servlet:
    16→    multipart:
    17→      max-file-size: 2048MB
    18→      max-request-size: 2048MB
    19→  jackson:
    20→    default-property-inclusion: non_null # 序列化忽略空值
    21→    date-format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss
    22→    time-zone: GMT+8
    23→    serialization:
    24→      FAIL_ON_EMPTY_BEANS: false
    25→    deserialization:
    26→      FAIL_ON_UNKNOWN_PROPERTIES: false # 反序列化时允许未知属性
    27→sk:
    28→  security:
    29→    url-token-authentication:
    30→      enabled: true # 默认开启 url token 认证
    31→flowable:
    32→  async-executor-activate: false
    33→  database-schema-update: false
    34→
    35→aj:
    36→  captcha:
    37→    jigsaw: classpath:images/jigsaw # 滑动验证，底图路径，不配置将使用默认图片；以 classpath: 开头，取 resource 目录下路径
    38→    pic-click: classpath:images/pic-click # 滑动验证，底图路径，不配置将使用默认图片；以 classpath: 开头，取 resource 目录下路径
    39→    cache-type: local # 缓存 local/redis...
    40→    cache-number: 1000 # local 缓存的阈值,达到这个值，清除缓存
    41→    timing-clear: 180 # local定时清除过期缓存(单位秒),设置为0代表不执行
    42→    type: blockPuzzle # 验证码类型 default两种都实例化。 blockPuzzle 滑块拼图 clickWord 文字点选
    43→    water-mark: survey # 右下角水印文字(我的水印)，可使用 https://tool.chinaz.com/tools/unicode.aspx 中文转 Unicode，Linux 可能需要转 unicode
    44→    interference-options: 2 # 滑动干扰项(0/1/2)
    45→    req-frequency-limit-enable: false # 接口请求次数一分钟限制是否开启 true|false

file.content:
version: 1.10.0
spring:
  application:
    name: survey
  profiles:
    active: @activeProfile@ # maven 配置
#    active: ${activeProfile} # gradle 配置
  mvc:
    async:
      request-timeout: -1
    static-path-pattern: /notfound # 覆盖默认的 /**
    throw-exception-if-no-handler-found: true
    pathmatch:
      matching-strategy: ant_path_matcher
  servlet:
    multipart:
      max-file-size: 2048MB
      max-request-size: 2048MB
  jackson:
    default-property-inclusion: non_null # 序列化忽略空值
    date-format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss
    time-zone: GMT+8
    serialization:
      FAIL_ON_EMPTY_BEANS: false
    deserialization:
      FAIL_ON_UNKNOWN_PROPERTIES: false # 反序列化时允许未知属性
sk:
  security:
    url-token-authentication:
      enabled: true # 默认开启 url token 认证
flowable:
  async-executor-activate: false
  database-schema-update: false

aj:
  captcha:
    jigsaw: classpath:images/jigsaw # 滑动验证，底图路径，不配置将使用默认图片；以 classpath: 开头，取 resource 目录下路径
    pic-click: classpath:images/pic-click # 滑动验证，底图路径，不配置将使用默认图片；以 classpath: 开头，取 resource 目录下路径
    cache-type: local # 缓存 local/redis...
    cache-number: 1000 # local 缓存的阈值,达到这个值，清除缓存
    timing-clear: 180 # local定时清除过期缓存(单位秒),设置为0代表不执行
    type: blockPuzzle # 验证码类型 default两种都实例化。 blockPuzzle 滑块拼图 clickWord 文字点选
    water-mark: survey # 右下角水印文字(我的水印)，可使用 https://tool.chinaz.com/tools/unicode.aspx 中文转 Unicode，Linux 可能需要转 unicode
    interference-options: 2 # 滑动干扰项(0/1/2)
    req-frequency-limit-enable: false # 接口请求次数一分钟限制是否开启 true|false
    req-get-lock-limit: 5 # 验证失败5次，get接口锁定
    req-get-lock-seconds: 10 # 验证失败后，锁定时间间隔
    req-get-minute-limit: 30 # get 接口一分钟内请求数限制
    req-check-minute-limit: 60 # check 接口一分钟内请求数限制
    req-verify-minute-limit: 60 # verify 接口一分钟内请求数限制

api:
  prefix: /api

surveyking:
  ai:
    siliconflow:
      enabled: true
      base-url: https://api.siliconflow.cn
      token: ${AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN:your_token}
      model-id: deepseek-chat
      model-types:
        - display-name: "DeepSeek Chat"
          value: "deepseek-chat"
          description: "DeepSeek 对话模型"
        - display-name: "Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct"
          value: "Qwen/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct"
          description: "Qwen2.5 72B 指令模型"
        - display-name: "Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct"
          value: "meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct"
          description: "Llama 3.1 70B 指令模型"

content.text:
看到了，`application-pro.yml` 里数据库连接信息没写死，说明是通过环境变量注入的（Spring Boot 默认支持 `SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL` 等）。

现在对齐你们的规范。你们的模式是：

1. **kubernetes 仓库**放 yaml 文件（namespace、pv、deployment）
2. **ConfigMap 从 `.env` 文件在服务器上手动创建**（不用 yaml）
3. **首次部署在服务器上手动执行**
4. **CI 只做 `rollout restart`**

# ==================== 测试服 (testserver 分支) ====================

# 检查 K8s 连接
check-testserver:

# 构建并推送镜像到内网仓库
docker-testserver:

  image: docker:19.03
  only:
    - testserver
  script:
    - docker build -f deploy/Dockerfile . -t 192.168.0.63:5000/px-surveyking-test:latest
    - docker push 192.168.0.63:5000/px-surveyking-test:latest
    - echo "镜像构建及推送完成"

# K8s 部署（首次 apply + 滚动更新）
deploy-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: deploy
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    refs:
      - testserver
  script:
    - git clone https://oauth2:mTVn_6baAR8Koua-ZGcB@pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/px/collabspace/kubernetes.git /tmp/kubernetes
    - kubectl apply -f /tmp/kubernetes/surveyking/namespace.yaml
    - kubectl apply -f /tmp/kubernetes/surveyking/surveyking-pv.yaml
    - kubectl apply -f /tmp/kubernetes/surveyking/surveyking-configmap.yaml
    - kubectl apply -f /tmp/kubernetes/surveyking/surveyking-deployment.yaml
    - kubectl rollout restart deployment surveyking-deploy -n surveyking

# ==================== 正式服 (master 分支) ====================

# 构建并推送镜像到 GCR
docker-master:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: docker
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/google/cloud-sdk:latest
  interruptible: true
  only:
    - master
  script:
    - gcloud auth activate-service-account --key-file ${GOOGLE_ONLINE_CONTAINER_REGISTRY}
    - gcloud auth configure-docker --quiet
    - docker build -f deploy/Dockerfile . -t us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-surveyking:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker push us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-surveyking:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker tag us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-surveyking:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-surveyking:latest
    - docker push us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-surveyking:latest
    - echo "px-surveyking:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} 推送成功"

# 部署留痕
deploy-master:
  tags:
    - xshell
  only:
    refs:
      - master
  stage: deploy
  variables:
    CACHE_DIR: "shell-runner-cache/surveyking-deployment"
    DIST_REPO: "https://oauth2:mTVn_6baAR8Koua-ZGcB@pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/px/surveyking/deployment.git"
  script:
    - export CACHE_DIR=${HOME}/${CACHE_DIR}
    - if ! [ -e $CACHE_DIR ]; then git clone -q $DIST_REPO $CACHE_DIR; fi
    - cd $CACHE_DIR
    - git fetch -q --prune --tags "origin"
    - git checkout -B master remotes/origin/master
    - cd $CACHE_DIR
    - git config user.email "$GITLAB_USER_EMAIL"
    - git config user.name "$GITLAB_USER_NAME"
    - 'git commit --allow-empty -m "surveyking: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE (SHA: $CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA)"'
    - git push -q "origin" master:master
    - echo "部署留痕提交完成"
  dependencies:
    - docker-master

content.text:
现在 `kubernetes/surveyking/` 目录结构跟其他项目对齐了：

```
kubernetes/surveyking/
├── .env                        # 环境变量（服务器上用来创建 ConfigMap）
├── namespace.yaml              # namespace
├── surveyking-pv.yaml          # PV + PVC
└── surveyking-deployment.yaml  # Deployment + Service
```

**首次部署流程**（在测试服务器上手动执行一次）：

```bash
# 1. clone kubernetes 仓库（如果服务器上还没有）
git clone https://pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/px/collabspace/kubernetes.git
cd kubernetes

# 2. 创建 pv 路径
sudo mkdir -p /mnt/data/surveyking
sudo chmod -R 755 /mnt/data/surveyking

# 3. 创建 namespace
kubectl apply -f surveyking/namespace.yaml

# 4. 创建 pv/pvc
kubectl apply -f surveyking/surveyking-pv.yaml

# 5. 在 MySQL 中创建 surveyking 数据库
# mysql -h <mysql地址> -u root -p123456 -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS surveyking DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;"

# 6. 从 .env 创建 ConfigMap
kubectl create configmap surveyking-configmap --from-env-file=surveyking/.env -n surveyking

# 7. 部署应用
kubectl apply -f surveyking/surveyking-deployment.yaml
```

之后 CI 推新镜像 + `rollout restart` 就行了。

**改动总结：**
1. `.gitlab-ci.yml` — deploy 阶段恢复为只做 `kubectl rollout restart`（跟其他项目一致）
2. `kubernetes/surveyking/` — 删掉 configmap yaml，改成 `.env` 文件方式（跟 collabspace 一致）
3. deployment yaml 里 configMapRef 名字改为 `surveyking-configmap`（跟团队命名规范一致）

你需要做的：先在服务器上跑一次上面的首次部署命令，之后 CI 就能正常跑了。

file.content:
stages:
  - apply-env
  - deploy

# 合并子目录中的 ci 配置
include:
  - local: "*/.gitlab-ci.yml"

apply-env-apitable:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: apply-env
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    refs:
      - master
    changes:
      - apitable/.env
  script:
    - kubectl create configmap apitable-configmap --from-env-file=./apitable/.env --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f - -n apitable
    - |
      for file in $(find ./apitable -name "*.yaml" -o -name "*.yml"); do
        if grep -q "kind: Deployment" "$file" && grep -q "apitable-configmap" "$file"; then
          DEPLOYMENT_NAME=$(grep -A2 "kind: Deployment" "$file" | grep "name:" | head -n1 | awk '{print $2}')
          if [ ! -z "$DEPLOYMENT_NAME" ]; then
            echo "重启使用configmap的deployment: $DEPLOYMENT_NAME"
            kubectl rollout restart deployment $DEPLOYMENT_NAME -n apitable
          fi
        fi
      done

apply-env-outline:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: apply-env
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    refs:
      - master
    changes:
      - outline/.env
  script:
    - kubectl create configmap outline-configmap --from-env-file=./outline/.env --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f - -n apitable
    - |
      for file in $(find ./outline -name "*.yaml" -o -name "*.yml"); do
        if grep -q "kind: Deployment" "$file" && grep -q "outline-configmap" "$file"; then
          DEPLOYMENT_NAME=$(grep -A2 "kind: Deployment" "$file" | grep "name:" | head -n1 | awk '{print $2}')
          if [ ! -z "$DEPLOYMENT_NAME" ]; then
            echo "重启使用configmap的deployment: $DEPLOYMENT_NAME"
            kubectl rollout restart deployment $DEPLOYMENT_NAME -n apitable

content.text:
明白了，kubernetes 仓库的模式是：

1. 根 `.gitlab-ci.yml` 用 `include: - local: "*/.gitlab-ci.yml"` 合并所有子目录的 CI
2. 每个项目子目录有自己的 `.gitlab-ci.yml`，负责 `apply-env`（更新 configmap）和 `deploy`（apply yaml + rollout restart）

file.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: surveyking-deploy
  namespace: surveyking
spec:
  replicas: 1
  revisionHistoryLimit: 3
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxUnavailable: 0
      maxSurge: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: surveyking
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: surveyking
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: surveyking
          image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-surveyking-test:latest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 1991
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
                name: surveyking-configmap
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "512Mi"
              cpu: "250m"
            limits:
              memory: "1Gi"
              cpu: "1000m"
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 1991
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 1991
            initialDelaySeconds: 60
            periodSeconds: 30
            failureThreshold: 3
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: surveyking-data
              mountPath: /app/files
              subPath: files
            - name: surveyking-data
              mountPath: /app/logs
              subPath: logs
          lifecycle:
            preStop:
              exec:
                command: ["sh", "-c", "sleep 5"]
      volumes:
        - name: surveyking-data
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: surveyking-pvc
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: surveyking-svc
  namespace: surveyking
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 1991
      targetPort: 1991
      protocol: TCP
      name: http-port
  selector:
    app: surveyking

content.text: 好了，格式清楚了。照着其他项目的模式给 surveyking 创建 `.gitlab-ci.yml`：

input.content:
surveyking:apply-env:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: apply-env
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    refs:
      - master
    changes:
      - surveyking/.env
  script:
    - kubectl create configmap surveyking-configmap --from-env-file=./surveyking/.env --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f - -n surveyking
    - |
      for file in $(find ./surveyking -name "*.yaml" -o -name "*.yml"); do
        if grep -q "kind: Deployment" "$file" && grep -q "surveyking-configmap" "$file"; then
          DEPLOYMENT_NAME=$(grep -A2 "kind: Deployment" "$file" | grep "name:" | head -n1 | awk '{print $2}')
          if [ ! -z "$DEPLOYMENT_NAME" ]; then
            echo "重启使用configmap的deployment: $DEPLOYMENT_NAME"
            kubectl rollout restart deployment $DEPLOYMENT_NAME -n surveyking
          fi
        fi
      done

surveyking:deploy:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: deploy
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    refs:
      - master
    changes:
      - surveyking/**/*
  script:
    - cd ./surveyking
    - find ./ -maxdepth 1 -name "*.yaml" | sort | xargs -I {} kubectl apply -f {}
    - kubectl -n surveyking rollout restart deployment surveyking-deploy
